mapper.select: SELECT u.nickname FROM shared_forest sf JOIN user u ON sf.user_id = u.id WHERE sf.forest_id = #{forestId}

SELECT f.id AS forestId , f.name AS forestName , COUNT(DISTINCT sf.user_id) AS memberCount FROM shared_forest sf JOIN forest f ON sf.forest_id = f.id WHERE sf.forest_id IN ( SELECT forest_id FROM shared_forest WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY f.id, f.name ORDER BY f.id

SELECT ui.id AS id , ui.item_id AS itemId , ui.total_count AS totalCount , ui.placed_count AS placedCount , i.`name` AS itemName , i.category_id AS categoryId , i.image_url AS imageUrl FROM user_item ui JOIN item i ON ui.item_id = i.id JOIN forest f ON ui.forest_id = f.id WHERE ui.forest_id = #{forestId} AND i.category_id = #{categoryId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM shared_forest sf WHERE sf.forest_id = f.id )
